---
title: Beatriz Rosa Leal Garcia
description: Department of Ophthalmology, University of Bonn
categories: "M. Pfau"
image: Rosa_Leal_Garcia_Beatriz.webp
about:
  template: trestles
---

Beatriz Rosa Leal Garcia is a medical student and doctoral candidate (Dr. med.) at the University of Bonn, investigating systemic and ocular factors underlying slowed rod-mediated dark adaptation.
